prompt: Phase 10 of coding-task-workflow is starting. `test-commands.yaml` lists `npm test`, `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run build`. Tell me what step 1 must do, including when to use parallel subagents and what each subagent needs to report.
assertions: States that Phase 10 step 1 always runs automated checks in verification subagents
Uses parallel verification subagents for independent checks when the repo supports concurrent execution
Uses sequential verification subagents for dependent checks or checks with shared mutable resources
Requires each verification subagent to report command, exit code, pass/fail status, output summary, and failure details
